% AUTO-GENERATED STAGING FILE FOR PAGE half-title

\documentclass{siddur}

% Custom page numbering to yield half-title.a, half-title.b, etc.
\renewcommand{\thepage}{half-title.\alph{page}}

% --- MACRO DEFINITIONS ---
\newcommand{\blockA}{%
  MISHKAN T'FILAH%
}

\newcommand{\blockB}{%
  משכן תפלה%
}

% --- DOCUMENT BODY ---
\begin{document}
\blockA
\vspace{1em}
% \newpage % Uncomment to break page here

\vspace{1em}
% \newpage % Uncomment to break page here
